text.text: Melee attack Apply Cursed fire and curse effect to target; Apply one of Edict effect to self. Edict effect is a series of Mob effect, do controversial would gain negative/positive effects.
Cursed fire would deal arcane damage to target per second. The source would be the last attacker and the damage would equal to the attacker`s attack damage.
Cursed would forbid entity being healed.
